title: Comment from The Light Collective, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
See attached file(s)

Please see the attached public comment submitted by The Light Collective regarding the proposed rule, Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5) (Docket ID: HHS-ONC-2025-0005). Our comment focuses specifically on the proposed removal of ONC security certification requirements and the need to prevent a gap in baseline, independently testable safeguards for certified health IT. We appreciate the opportunity to provide input and respectfully request that ASTP/ONC consider the recommendations outlined in the attached document.

attachments.title: Re_ HTI-5_ Document ID_ HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001_The Light Collective
